title: alunia graveolens
intro: Alunia graveolens, also known as Rue or Herbs of Grace, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alunia graveolens include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, alleviate menstrual cramps, and provide relief from insect bites and minor skin irritations. Alunia graveolens can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or dried herb to be used in various herbal remedies.
